name: Pumpkin-Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, oil, egg and pumpkin until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the dry ingredients and orange juice. Add the nuts and raisins. Stir to blend.
3. Pour into a lightly oiled 13 by 9 inch baking pan. Sprinkle on the coconut.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes.
5. Cool the pan completely on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
6. Cut into bars.
1 bar - 114 calories, 1 bread, 1 fat exchange, 13 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 7 grams fat, 52 mg sodium, 104 mg potassium, 11 mg cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
